sys_app_requirement.acceptance_criteria: A booking confirmation email is sent to the student immediately after a lesson is created. A reminder email is sent to the teacher when a lesson has homework that has not been updated. Both notifications use scoped email templates.
sys_app_requirement.description: Configure automated email notifications: (1) Booking Confirmation — triggered on lesson record creation, sent to the student with lesson date/time details; (2) Homework Reminder — triggered when a lesson transitions to Completed state but the homework field is still empty, sent to the assigned teacher. Both notifications must use scoped Notification records within the x_608645_my_comp_0 application.
sys_app_requirement.name: REQ-010: Automated Email Notifications
